document_b.label: Document B
document_b.document_type: Commercial Invoice with attached Packing List

activated_rules.rule_name: Koncernstruktur / consignor found elsewhere in invoice documents
Mixed origins / koppling vara–ursprungsland vid flera ursprung

consignor.certificate_value:
Berg Prop Prod. AB
Tärnvägen 15
SE-475 40, HÖNÖ
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Page 11 and 16: Berg Propulsion Production AB
Långesand 1, Box 1005
SE-475 22 ÖCKERÖ
Org.nr: 556568-3058
and pages 1-16 header/footer branding: BERG PROPULSION / Berg Propulsion Middle East (Branch), Dubai, UAE
consignor.motivation: Certifikatets consignor återfinns inte som fakturautställare i huvudfältet, men företagsnamnet förekommer uttryckligen i fakturaunderlaget på sidorna 11 och 16 som 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'. Certifikatets avkortade namn 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' är identifierbart mot detta uttryckliga namn i fakturadokumenten enligt koncernstrukturregeln 4.1.0, och land Sweden överensstämmer.

consignee.certificate_value:
HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L
MSM - Workshop
Building Number- 56
Street Number -- 3019, Zone - 91
Birkat Al Awamer
City- Doha,
PIC: Vinu Vijayan Pillai - Workshop
Qatar
consignee.invoice_value: Delivery address (invoice page 1 / packing list page 12): HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L.L / W.L MSM - Workshop, Building Number – 56, Street Number – 3019, Zone – 91, Birkat Al Awamer, City- Doha, Qatar, PIC: Vinu Vijayan Pillai
consignee.motivation: Mottagaren i certifikatet kan uttryckligen identifieras i fakturans Delivery address. Skillnaden W.L vs W.L.L påverkar inte identifieringen efter tillåten normalisering av bolagsbeteckning, och land Qatar överensstämmer.

goods_description.invoice_value: Packing List page 16: Kolli 1: 80*60*35 cm/ 106 Kg; Kolli 2: 120*80*35 cm /282 Kg; Kolli 3: 120*80*35 cm /315 Kg; 80*60*55cm/ 120 Kg. Commercial invoice pages 1-11 list detailed spare parts and one packing/handling cost line.
goods_description.motivation: Certifikatet anger endast kolli-/förpackningsbeskrivning och flera ursprungsländer i box 3. Certifikatet anger inte separat vilka varor som hör till respektive ursprungsland och innehåller inte uttrycklig fakturahänvisning såsom 'according to attached invoice' enligt 4.3.7. Därför är kopplingen vara–ursprungsland inte verifierbar och kontrollpunkten blir MISMATCH.

quantity.invoice_value: No quantity stated in certificate box 7. Box 6 contains '4 Cases' and case dimensions/weights. Packing List page 16 shows corresponding 4 package measurements/weights.
quantity.motivation: Certifikatet saknar uttrycklig kvantitetsuppgift i fält 7 Quantity/Mängd. Enligt 4.4.2.1 ska verifieringen utgå uteslutande från fältet Quantity/Mängd när flera kvantitetsuppgifter förekommer. Eftersom box 7 är tom finns ingen verifieringsgrundande kvantitetsuppgift. Uppgifter i box 6 får inte ersätta den saknade kvantiteten i box 7 för denna kontrollpunkt.

origin.certificate_value: SE, DE, GB, CH, IT, ES, TW, AT
origin.invoice_value: Invoice pages 1-11 explicitly state origins including Sweden, Germany, United Kingdom, Switzerland, Italy, Spain, Taiwan, Austria, and also additional explicit origins such as Qatar (mailing address only, not origin), plus non-certificate origin 'Switzerland' yes in certificate, and invoice also states 'Country of origin: Germany/Sweden/United Kingdom/Switzerland/Italy/Spain/Taiwan/Austria' on multiple lines.
origin.motivation: Alla ursprungsländer i certifikatet kan identifieras uttryckligen i fakturan. Fakturan innehåller dock även explicit ursprungsland Sweden, Germany, United Kingdom, Switzerland, Italy, Spain, Taiwan och Austria for listed items, but also page 10 shows additional explicit origin 'Switzerland' already included, and no missing certificate country was found. However the document set is inconsistent because the certificate lists only country codes without per-article allocation while invoice contains mixed origins per article; together with missing explicit linkage in certificate under 4.3.7 the origin claim cannot be safely verified for the goods covered by the certificate. Therefore origin is treated as MISMATCH in the paired verification context.

critical_failures: Goods description/origin linkage fails under rule 4.3.7 because certificate lists multiple origins without per-item linkage or explicit invoice reference.
Quantity fails because certificate box 7 is empty and no verification-basis quantity exists under rule 4.4.2.1.
Origin cannot be accepted in paired context due to unresolved mixed-origin linkage between certificate and invoice.
overall_assessment.decision_summary: Document pair classified as Certificate of Origin and Commercial Invoice with attached Packing List. Consignor and consignee are verifiable. However the certificate contains multiple origin countries and only package/case information in goods field, without explicit invoice-reference wording and without per-item origin allocation. In addition, certificate quantity box 7 is empty. Therefore at least one critical control point is MISMATCH, resulting in comparison_result NOT_IDENTICAL and workflow_recommendation MANUAL_HANDLING_REQUIRED.
